extDescription.message: Files e-mail attachments into predefined folders with one click from the context menu. Multiple targets can be set up per account and appear as a submenu.

notifyNoMessageBody.message: Could not determine the related message.

notifyNothingSavedBody.message: All attachments failed (details in the console).

optionsTagline.message: Set up download targets and save attachments there with a single click — no more hunting for the right folder every time.

globalCardHint.message: Account-independent targets — shown for every e-mail, above the account targets.

accountsCardHint.message: Account targets are only shown for e-mails of the respective account. Pick the folder via 📁. The name is free text and appears in the menu (empty = folder path).

debugLabel.message: Debug logging to the console (Add-ons → gear icon → "Debug Add-ons" → Inspect)
